titleEn: The Clever Rabbit and the Lion
summaryAm: ትንሽ ጥንቸል ትልቅ አንበሳን በሰላም የሚያስተምርበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ብልሃት ከሰላም ጋር ሲጠቀም ትልቅ ጉልበትን ያረጋጋል።

source.name: Traditional African folktale
source.notes: Traditional/public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: በሜዳ ውስጥ አንበሳው በጣም ድምፁን ያሰማ ነበር።
pages.textEn: In the meadow, the lion used a very loud voice.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Clever Rabbit and the Lion, page 1: በሜዳ ውስጥ አንበሳው በጣም ድምፁን ያሰማ ነበር።

pages.textAm: እንስሳቱ ትንሽ ፈሩ፣ ጥንቸሉ ግን በቀስታ ለመናገር ወሰነ።
pages.textEn: The animals felt a little afraid, but Rabbit decided to speak gently.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Clever Rabbit and the Lion, page 2: እንስሳቱ ትንሽ ፈሩ፣ ጥንቸሉ ግን በቀስታ ለመናገር ወሰነ።

pages.textAm: ጥንቸሉ አንበሳውን ወደ ጸጥ ያለ የውሃ ጉድጓድ መራው።
pages.textEn: Rabbit led the lion to a quiet water pool.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Clever Rabbit and the Lion, page 3: ጥንቸሉ አንበሳውን ወደ ጸጥ ያለ የውሃ ጉድጓድ መራው።

pages.textAm: አንበሳው በውሃ ውስጥ የራሱን ጥላ አየ። ውሃው ጸጥ ስለነበር የራሱን ፊት በግልጽ ማየት ቻለ።
pages.textEn: The lion saw his reflection in the quiet water and could look clearly at his own face.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Clever Rabbit and the Lion, page 4: lion looking at his reflection in a quiet pool beside Rabbit.

pages.textAm: ጥንቸሉ አልተቸኮለም። “ጸጥ ያለ ውሃ ፊታችንን በግልጽ ያሳየናል” ብሎ አንበሳውን በቀስታ አዳመጠው።
pages.textEn: Rabbit did not rush; he said quiet water helps us see clearly, and he listened to the lion gently.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Clever Rabbit and the Lion, page 5: Rabbit calmly listening beside a lion at a quiet water pool.

pages.textAm: አንበሳው በቀስታ መናገር ለመሞከር ተስማማ። ጥንቸሉም “መጀመሪያ እንተንፍስ” ብሎ አሳየው።
pages.textEn: The lion agreed to try speaking softly, and Rabbit showed him how to breathe first.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Child-friendly warm storybook illustration for The Clever Rabbit and the Lion, page 6: Rabbit teaching a lion to breathe calmly before speaking softly.

pages.textAm: ጥንቸሉ አንበሳውን ለመናገር ትንሽ ጊዜ ጠበቀ። አንበሳው ሲረጋጋ እሱ በለስላሳ ድምፅ ቀረበ።
pages.textEn: Rabbit waited until the lion was calm, then spoke softly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Small rabbit approaching a calm lion in a sunny meadow.

pages.textAm: “ድምፅህ ትልቅ ነው፣ ልብህም ትልቅ ሊሆን ይችላል” አለ ጥንቸሉ። አንበሳውም ይህን ቃል ለመስማት ቆመ።
pages.textEn: Rabbit told the lion that a big voice can come with a big heart.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Rabbit speaking kindly to a thoughtful lion.

pages.textAm: በውሃው አጠገብ አንበሳው ፊቱን በጸጥታ አየ። “ሰላም ስሰጥ ሁሉም ይቀርባል” ብሎ አሰበ።
pages.textEn: At the water, the lion thought about giving peace so others could come near.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Lion looking at his reflection in a quiet pool beside Rabbit.

pages.textAm: አንበሳው ወደ ሜዳው ተመልሶ በቀስታ ሰላም አለ። ትንንሽ እንስሳትም በቀስታ ወደ እሱ ቀረቡ።
pages.textEn: The lion returned and greeted the meadow softly.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Lion softly greeting small meadow animals while Rabbit smiles.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ቀን በኋላ አንበሳው ትልቅ ጉልበቱን ለመጠበቅ ተጠቀመ። ጥንቸሉም ብልሃት በሰላም ሲመራ እንደሚያበራ አስታወሰ።
pages.textEn: After that, the lion used his strength to protect, and Rabbit remembered peaceful cleverness.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Peaceful lion watching over a meadow beside a clever rabbit.
